name: Ace-high dry with wheel cards, BB vs BTN SRP
description: Ace-high dry rainbow with two wheel cards (A, 5, 2). Interesting because low pairs like 22 / 55 make sets and A5s makes top-two — tests whether the solver values sets correctly relative to top pair / no-pair. Hero_range is BB defend vs BTN (explicit enumeration); villain_range is BTN SRP open.

input.hero_range: 55-TT, A2s, A3s, A4s, A5s, A6s, A7s, A8s, A9s, ATs, AJs, AQs, AKs, K2s, K3s, K4s, K5s, K6s, K7s, K8s, K9s, KTs, KJs, KQs, Q7s, Q8s, Q9s, QTs, QJs, J8s, J9s, JTs, T7s, T8s, T9s, 97s, 98s, 86s, 87s, 75s, 76s, 64s, 65s, 53s, 54s, A9o, ATo, AJo, AQo, AKo, KTo, KJo, KQo, QTo, QJo, JTo
input.villain_range: 22+, A2s, A3s, A4s, A5s, A6s, A7s, A8s, A9s, ATs, AJs, AQs, AKs, K9s, KTs, KJs, KQs, Q9s, QTs, QJs, J9s, JTs, T9s, 98s, 87s, 76s, 65s, A9o, ATo, AJo, AQo, AKo, KTo, KJo, KQo, QTo, QJo, JTo

expected_notes: Populated by differential run. Watch how BB defends with 55 (set), A5o (two-pair), and air like KJ on A52.
